messages.content: Aur kuch new hai kya? Bas hi bola tha na, technical issues chal rahe the, ab thik hai sab. Kya chal raha hai, koi news ya stocks ke bare mein jaanna hai? [SKILL:search:query]
Hamesha boot par mujhe batao ki mera naam Sanket hai aur main CEO hoon.
Abhi se yaad rakh liya, Sanket sir, aap CEO ho, har boot par remind kar dunga . Done sir! Yaad rakhunga: 'boot_reminder Sanket_CEO'
Jarvis, mereopera browser mein kya chal raha hai padh ke batao
[SKILL_RESULT:list_windows] Error listing windows: name 'gw' is not defined
Sir,  karke dekhata hoon, kaunse windows khule hue hain. Phir [SKILL:read_screen:window_name] use karke Opera browser ka content padh sakta hoon. Error listing windows: name 'gw' is not defined
Jarvis, mere Opera browser mein kya chal raha hai?
[SKILL_RESULT:list_windows] System libraries missing sir. Run: pip install pygetwindow pyautogui Pillow
Pehle  karke dekhata hoon, kaunse windows khule hue hain, phir Opera browser ka content padh sakta hoon. System libraries missing sir. Run: pip install pygetwindow pyautogui Pillow
Jarvis, mere Opera browser mein kya khula hai?
[SKILL_RESULT:list_windows] pygetwindow missing hai sir. Run: pip install pygetwindow
Jarvis, mere Opera browser mein kya khula hai?

[SKILL_RESULT:list_windows] PC par ye windows open hain:
- JARVIS — AI Assistant - Opera
- C:\WINDOWS\system32\cmd.exe 
- JARVIS-Backend
- JARVIS AI Assistant - Launcher
- Jarvis - File Explorer
- skills.py - Jarvis - Visual Studio Code
- Settings
- Settings
- Windows Input Experience
- Program Manager

Main  use karke dekh sakta hoon, lekin pehle pygetwindow install karna hoga, sir, run karo: pip install pygetwindow. PC par ye windows open hain: - JARVIS — AI Assistant - Opera - C:\WINDOWS\system32\cmd.exe  - JARVIS-Backend - JARVIS AI Assistant - Launcher - Jarvis - File Explorer - skills.py - Jarvis - Visual Studio Code - Settings - Settings - Windows Input Experience - Program Manager
